steps.title: Focus on the year
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize when Le Sidaner won a Carnegie Prize gold medal. The relevant note says his painting was honored in 1925.

steps.title: Keep the emphasis on 1925
steps.content: A describes the prize generally. B omits Le Sidaner's name and the year. C identifies the painting but does not mention 1925. The sentence that names Le Sidaner and foregrounds the year directly meets the goal. The answer is D.
